title: YTP: Lightning Eats Purina Ka-Chow
description:
In this video, Lightning and Mater skip the big race to crash some weddings.

I've been working on this YouTube Poop on and off since 2022. Only this month did I have the chance to build it out the way I wanted, and by golly is it BEAUTIFUL!
